response.justification: The candidate lacks critical experience for this embedded networking/security role. While they have extensive software development experience, their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, high-level languages (TypeScript, JavaScript), and backend services, with no demonstrated experience in C for embedded systems, Linux kernel modification, or networking hardware (switches, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X). Native Japanese proficiency is not evident from the resume. Their expertise in Dlang and Node.js does not align with the job's technical requirements.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and diverse programming language experience
Proven ability to work in full-stack and embedded-like environments (e.g., C/C++ for NI LabWindows/CVI)
Open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective)
concerns: No direct experience with C programming for embedded/UNIX systems or Linux kernel modification
Lacks exposure to networking hardware (switches, Layer 2/3 protocols) or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X)
No evidence of Japanese language proficiency or switch chip knowledge
